title: GitHub Repo Sync to Wiki Inbox
description: Automatically download GitHub repositories I create or star, clone them locally, and maintain an indexed catalog in my wiki inbox folder.
problem: GitHub repos don't automatically sync to local machine. No centralized index in wiki. Manual clone and organization process.
solution: Background service that monitors GitHub for new repos, auto-clones to ~/wiki/inbox/repos/, generates wiki index with metadata
successCriteria: New repos appear in wiki inbox within 1 hour
